requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz, IEC 62368-1-Aligned NB Standard, Plug Type A/C
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz、对应IEC 62368-1的NB标准、A/C型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz、對應IEC 62368-1的NB標準、A/C型插頭

summary.en: Bolivia operates at 220 V / 50 Hz. IBNORCA adopts IEC-based NB (Norma Boliviana) standards for electrical safety; the applicable standard for audio/video and IT equipment including wireless IoT devices is aligned with IEC 62368-1. Electrical safety compliance is required as part of the ATT homologación process and may also be assessed under IBNORCA conformity evaluation. Bolivia uses a mixed plug environment: Type A (US flat-blade, two-pin) and Type C (European round-pin, two-pin) are both found; sockets in older installations may only accept Type C. Chinese devices rated for 100–240 V AC are broadly compatible but must be verified for 50 Hz operation; devices rated for 220–240 V only are compatible. Devices rated for 110 V only or 60 Hz only are not suitable for the Bolivian market without modification. A bundled Type A or Type C plug adapter may be required depending on socket prevalence in the target installation environment.
summary.zh: 玻利维亚采用220V/50Hz电制。IBNORCA采用基于IEC的NB（玻利维亚标准）电气安全标准；适用于音视频及IT设备（含无线物联网设备）的标准与IEC 62368-1对应。电气安全合规性作为ATT型式认证的组成部分，也可通过IBNORCA合格评定进行评估。玻利维亚使用混合插头环境：A型（美式扁脚，两芯）和C型（欧式圆脚，两芯）均有使用；旧式插座可能仅支持C型。额定100–240V AC的中国设备通常兼容，但须核验50Hz运行；仅额定220–240V的设备亦兼容。仅额定110V或仅适用60Hz的设备未经改造不适合玻利维亚市场。根据目标安装环境中插座类型的分布，可能需要随附A型或C型插头适配器。
summary.zht: 玻利維亞採用220V/50Hz電制。IBNORCA採用基於IEC的NB（玻利維亞標準）電氣安全標準；適用於音視頻及IT設備（含無線物聯網裝置）的標準與IEC 62368-1對應。電氣安全合規性作為ATT型式認證的組成部分，也可通過IBNORCA合格評定進行評估。玻利維亞使用混合插頭環境：A型（美式扁腳，兩芯）和C型（歐式圓腳，兩芯）均有使用；舊式插座可能僅支持C型。額定100–240V AC的中國裝置通常相容，但須核驗50Hz運行；僅額定220–240V的裝置亦相容。僅額定110V或僅適用60Hz的裝置未經改造不適合玻利維亞市場。根據目標安裝環境中插座類型的分布，可能需要隨附A型或C型插頭適配器。

standards_or_laws: IBNORCA NB standard aligned with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video/IT equipment safety)
ATT homologación electrical safety technical requirements
Bolivia power supply standard: 220 V / 50 Hz

summary.en: China's electrical safety standard for audio/video and IT equipment is GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 60950-1) or GB 62368-1 (harmonised with IEC 62368-1 for newer product categories). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is required for listed product categories. Chinese mains power is 220 V / 50 Hz — the voltage and frequency match Bolivia, though plug type is different (China uses Type A or Type I; Bolivia uses Type A/C).
summary.zh: 中国音视频及IT设备电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1协调）或GB 62368-1（针对新产品类别，与IEC 62368-1协调）。列入目录的产品类别须取得CCC认证。中国电制为220V/50Hz——电压和频率与玻利维亚一致，但插头型式不同（中国使用A型或I型；玻利维亚使用A/C型）。
summary.zht: 中國音視頻及IT設備電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1協調）或GB 62368-1（針對新產品類別，與IEC 62368-1協調）。列入目錄的產品類別須取得CCC認證。中國電制為220V/50Hz——電壓和頻率與玻利維亞一致，但插頭型式不同（中國使用A型或I型；玻利維亞使用A/C型）。

standards_or_laws: CCC Compulsory Certification for listed categories

gap.en: CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Bolivia. The voltage and frequency (220 V / 50 Hz) match China's domestic standard, reducing the risk of hardware incompatibility, but Bolivian IBNORCA NB / IEC 62368-1-aligned safety conformity is required independently. The mixed Type A/C plug environment in Bolivia differs from China's Type A/I norm; devices with a fixed Chinese plug may need a bundled adapter or localised power cord for Bolivia shipments.
gap.zh: CCC电气安全认证不被玻利维亚认可。电压和频率（220V/50Hz）与中国国内标准一致，降低了硬件不兼容的风险，但仍须独立满足玻利维亚IBNORCA NB/IEC 62368-1对应的安全合规要求。玻利维亚A/C型混合插头环境与中国A/I型规范不同；带固定中国插头的设备可能需要随附适配器或针对玻利维亚发货提供本地化电源线。
gap.zht: CCC電氣安全認證不被玻利維亞認可。電壓和頻率（220V/50Hz）與中國國內標準一致，降低了硬體不相容的風險，但仍須獨立滿足玻利維亞IBNORCA NB/IEC 62368-1對應的安全合規要求。玻利維亞A/C型混合插頭環境與中國A/I型規範不同；帶固定中國插頭的裝置可能需要隨附適配器或針對玻利維亞發貨提供本地化電源線。

source.publisher: IBNORCA — Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to IBNORCA NB standards (IEC 62368-1-aligned) at 220 V / 50 Hz is required in Bolivia as part of ATT homologación. CCC certification is not a substitute. The 220 V / 50 Hz power supply matches China's domestic standard, reducing voltage/frequency risk, but plug compatibility (Type A/C environment) must be addressed — a bundled adapter or localised power cable is recommended for Bolivia market shipments. Exporters must confirm device power supply ratings cover 220 V / 50 Hz before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 玻利维亚要求在ATT型式认证框架内符合IBNORCA NB标准（对应IEC 62368-1，220V/50Hz）的电气安全要求，CCC认证不能替代。220V/50Hz电制与中国国内标准一致，降低电压/频率风险，但须解决插头兼容性问题（A/C型混合环境）——建议玻利维亚市场货物随附插头适配器或采用本地化电源线。出口商在出口前须确认设备电源额定值涵盖220V/50Hz。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 玻利維亞要求在ATT型式認證框架內符合IBNORCA NB標準（對應IEC 62368-1，220V/50Hz）的電氣安全要求，CCC認證不能替代。220V/50Hz電制與中國國內標準一致，降低電壓/頻率風險，但須解決插頭相容性問題（A/C型混合環境）——建議玻利維亞市場貨物隨附插頭適配器或採用本地化電源線。出口商在出口前須確認裝置電源額定值涵蓋220V/50Hz。
